arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-04-21T11:25:00+08:00
author: metaclaw_agent
status: active
---

# Project Orion - New Team Member Onboarding Guide

**Guide Effective From:** 2026-04-21T00:00:00+08:00

Welcome to Project Orion! This guide will help you get up and running with our development environment and workflows.

---

## Environment Setup

### 1. Development Machine Requirements
- **OS:** macOS 12+ (recommended) or Ubuntu 20.04 LTS
- **RAM:** 16GB minimum, 32GB recommended
- **Storage:** 50GB free space for dependencies and datasets

### 2. Required Software
```bash
# Core development tools
- Git (v2.35+)
- Node.js (v18 LTS) + npm
- Python (v3.10+)
- Docker + Docker Compose
- PostgreSQL 14 (or use Docker)
- Redis 7 (or use Docker)
```

### 3. Repository Access
1. Request access to the `orion-tech` GitHub organization
2. Clone the main repository: `git clone git@github.com:orion-tech/project-orion.git`
3. Set up your GPG key for signed commits

### 4. Local Environment Configuration
```bash
# Copy environment template
cp .env.example .env

# Install dependencies
npm install
pip install -r requirements.txt

# Start local services
docker-compose up -d postgres redis

# Run database migrations
npm run db:migrate

# Seed development data
npm run db:seed
```

---

## Key Tools

### Development Tools
| Tool | Purpose | Access |
|------|---------|--------|
| GitHub | Source control & code review | github.com/orion-tech |
| Jira | Task tracking & sprint planning | jira.orion-tech.com |
| Confluence | Documentation & knowledge base | wiki.orion-tech.com |
| Slack | Team communication | orion-tech.slack.com |
| Figma | UI/UX design collaboration | figma.com/orion-design |

### Internal Services
| Service | Purpose | URL |
|---------|---------|-----|
| Staging API | Test environment | https://api-staging.projectorion.com |
| Staging App | Test UI | https://app-staging.projectorion.com |
| Grafana | Monitoring & metrics | https://grafana.orion-tech.com |
| Sentry | Error tracking | https://sentry.orion-tech.com |

### Development Scripts
```bash
# Start development server
npm run dev

# Run tests
npm run test          # Unit tests
npm run test:e2e      # End-to-end tests

# Code quality
npm run lint
npm run type-check
npm run format
```

---

## Workflow Overview

### Sprint Cycle (2 weeks)
1. **Sprint Planning** (Monday) — Commit to sprint tasks
2. **Daily Standup** (9:00 AM CST) — Async updates in Slack #standup
3. **Mid-Sprint Review** — Progress check and scope adjustment
4. **Sprint Demo** (Friday Week 2) — Show completed work
5. **Retrospective** — Process improvements

### Development Workflow
1. Pick up a task from the sprint board (Jira)
2. Create a feature branch: `git checkout -b feature/PROJ-123-short-desc`
3. Make changes with regular commits (signed)
4. Push branch and open Pull Request (minimum 1 review required)
5. Ensure CI passes (lint, tests, build)
6. Address review feedback
7. Merge to `main` (squash + merge)
8. Deploy to staging automatically

### Code Review Guidelines
- Review within 24 hours of PR creation
- Check: functionality, tests, documentation, security
- Be constructive in feedback
- Approve only when confident in the change

---

## First-Week Checklist

### Day 1: Account & Access
- [ ] Complete HR onboarding paperwork
- [ ] Receive laptop and equipment
- [ ] Set up email and Slack account
- [ ] Join key Slack channels: #general, #backend, #dev-talk, #alerts
- [ ] Get added to GitHub organization
- [ ] Schedule 1:1 with your manager (Alex Zhang)

### Day 2: Environment
- [ ] Clone repositories and set up local environment
- [ ] Verify `npm run dev` starts successfully
- [ ] Run test suite and confirm passes
- [ ] Access staging environment
- [ ] Set up IDE (VSCode recommended) with team extensions

### Day 3: Codebase Exploration
- [ ] Read through `README.md` and `ARCHITECTURE.md`
- [ ] Review recent PRs to understand code style
- [ ] Pick up a "good first issue" from Jira
- [ ] Attend team standup and introduce yourself

### Day 4: First Contribution
- [ ] Complete your first small task
- [ ] Open your first PR
- [ ] Go through the review process
- [ ] Merge your first change!

### Day 5: Integration
- [ ] Attend sprint planning or review (depending on schedule)
- [ ] Complete team intro meetings (Bai, Chen, Dana)
- [ ] Review project roadmap and upcoming milestones
- [ ] Identify areas of interest for future contributions

### Ongoing First Month
- [ ] Complete security training module
- [ ] Shadow a production deployment
- [ ] Participate in your first retrospective
- [ ] Document any onboarding gaps you encountered

---

## Getting Help

**Technical Questions:**
- #backend Slack channel for backend engineering
- #frontend Slack channel for UI development  
- #help Slack channel for general questions

**HR / Administrative:**
- Contact Sarah in HR for benefits and policy questions
- Your manager (Alex Zhang) for role-specific guidance

**Urgent Issues:**
- Page the on-call engineer via PagerDuty
- Escalate to Alex Zhang if blocked >2 hours

---

## Resources

- [Engineering Handbook](https://wiki.orion-tech.com/handbook)
- [API Documentation](https://docs.projectorion.com)
- [Architecture Decision Records](./adr/)
- [Runbooks](./runbooks/)

---

Welcome to the team! We're excited to have you build with us.

*Last updated: 2026-04-21T11:25:00+08:00*
